steps.action: Saman (also known as the dance of a thousand han with weight transfer through footwork, pivot turn, partner opposite, accent beat, grounded.
steps.text: Saman (also known as the dance of a thousand han with weight transfer through footwork, pivot turn, partner opposite, accent beat, grounded.

steps.action: Its origin is from the Gayo ethnic group from Ga
steps.text: Its origin is from the Gayo ethnic group from Gayo Lues, Aceh province, Indonesia, and it is usually performed to celebrate important occasions.

steps.action: The dance is characterized by its fast-paced rhy
steps.text: The dance is characterized by its fast-paced rhythm and common harmony between dancers.

steps.action: These two elements are key figures of Saman and
steps.text: These two elements are key figures of Saman and are among the reasons Saman is widely known and practiced in Indonesia, besides being relatively easy to learn.
On November 24, 2011, UNESCO officially recognized Aceh's traditional Saman dance as an Intangible Cultural Heritage in Need of Urgent Safeguarding.

steps.action: The ASEAN Tourism Association (ASEANTA) named th
steps.text: The ASEAN Tourism Association (ASEANTA) named the Saman dance as the best ASEAN cultural preservation effort at the 25th ASEANTA Awards for Excellence 2012.

steps.action: Syekh Saman developed a dance which is now calle
steps.text: Syekh Saman developed a dance which is now called the Saman dance to spread Islam in the land of Gayo, Province of Aceh, Indonesia.

steps.action: In performing this dance, the player sings some
steps.text: In performing this dance, the player sings some songs (syair) while doing the attractive movements.

steps.action: A short song (which leads to a short dance) can
steps.text: A short song (which leads to a short dance) can last for approximately 15 to 20 minutes.

steps.action: The dancers then begin to move their hands rhyth
steps.text: The dancers then begin to move their hands rhythmically, following the movements.

steps.action: As the dance progresses, the movements are also
steps.text: As the dance progresses, the movements are also performed with arms, head, and the upper body.

steps.action: The key element is that every dancer must move a
steps.text: The key element is that every dancer must move at the same time, creating a homogeneous, continuous line of movement that is often described as the defining feature of Saman dance.

steps.action: One thing that makes this dance unique is that t
steps.text: One thing that makes this dance unique is that the original Saman dance, which comes from Gayo Lues, is not accompanied by any musical instruments.

steps.action: Originally, the group was exclusively men.
steps.text: Originally, the group was exclusively men.

steps.action: The singer then begins to sing, with the lyrics
steps.text: The singer then begins to sing, with the lyrics at the beginning commonly telling the general attributes of Gayo culture at a medium pace.

steps.action: The pace becomes faster, and the seat positions
steps.text: The pace becomes faster, and the seat positions may change.
